name: Unstructured AI
shortDescription: Pre-processing pipeline for transforming raw documents into structured data for AI applications.
detailDescription: Unstructured AI transforms raw documents (PDFs, Word docs, images, etc.) into clean, structured data ready for AI applications. It handles document layout analysis, table extraction, OCR, and content categorization automatically. Perfect for organizations dealing with large volumes of documents that need to be processed for AI applications, search, or analytics.
